name: Pasta with Shrimp and Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/3 of the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add shrimp to the skillet and cook until pink, about 2 minutes on each side.
4. Remove shrimp using a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add remaining butter to the skillet and melt it.
6. Add broccoli, mushrooms, oregano, thyme, and basil to the skillet. Sauté for 2 minutes.
7. Add zucchini to the skillet and continue cooking until vegetables are tender, about 2 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to low.
9. Return shrimp to the skillet and heat through.
10. Arrange vegetables and shrimp over spaghetti.
11. Top with remaining garlic butter from the skillet.
12. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top and serve immediately.
